name: fluent-coder-e2e
description: End-to-end tests for the Fluent Coder Tauri app, driven via tauri-driver + WebdriverIO.

comments.overrides: serialize-javascript@<7.0.6 (pulled transitively by mocha) is vulnerable to RCE via RegExp.flags and CPU-exhaustion DoS. Pin to the patched 7.0.6 to clear the Dependabot alerts; serialize-javascript is API-compatible across this bump.
